title: Farming and Food
description: Learn to grow crops and manage food

content.text:
Farming Basics

Food is essential for survival. Farming provides a reliable food source.

Getting Seeds:

  • Break grass to get seeds
  • Find villages with farms
  • Some crops drop seeds when harvested

Creating a Farm:

  • Till dirt with a hoe to create farmland
  • Plant seeds on the farmland
  • Water nearby helps crops grow faster
  • Wait for crops to mature

Common Crops:

  • Wheat - Used for bread and breeding animals
  • Carrots - Good food source
  • Potatoes - Can be cooked for better food
  • Beetroot - Used for soup and dye

Food Tips:

  • Cook food for better hunger restoration
  • Keep a variety of food sources
  • Don't let your hunger bar reach zero
content.task: Create a small wheat farm and harvest the wheat to make bread.
